name: gnomad_get_constraint
description: Get gene-level constraint metrics from gnomAD (Genome Aggregation Database) for a single gene, given a gene symbol (e.g. BRCA1) OR an Ensembl gene ID (e.g. ENSG00000012048). Returns a flat, curated summary: pLI (probability of loss-of-function intolerance), oe_lof (observed/expected LoF ratio) with its lower/upper confidence bounds, LOEUF (= oe_lof_upper, the recommended constraint metric; lower = more constrained), missense Z-score (mis_z), synonymous Z-score (syn_z), and expected/observed LoF counts (exp_lof, obs_lof). The `dataset` parameter selects the constraint release: gnomad_r4 (default) and gnomad_r3 use GRCh38 (gnomAD v4 constraint); gnomad_r2_1 and exac use GRCh37. Note: gnomAD uses current HGNC symbols (e.g. GBA1, not GBA). No API key required.

gene_symbol.description: HGNC gene symbol, e.g. 'BRCA1', 'TP53', 'GBA1'. Provide this OR gene_id.

gene_id.description: Ensembl gene ID, e.g. 'ENSG00000012048' (BRCA1). Provide this OR gene_symbol.

dataset.description: gnomAD dataset release selecting the constraint table. 'gnomad_r4' (default) and 'gnomad_r3' -> GRCh38 / gnomAD v4 constraint; 'gnomad_r2_1' and 'exac' -> GRCh37 / gnomAD v2.1.1 era constraint.

oneOf.description: Successful response with curated gene constraint metrics.

reference_genome.description: Reference genome used for the constraint table (GRCh38 or GRCh37).

pLI.description: Probability of being loss-of-function intolerant (0-1); >=0.9 = highly constrained.

oe_lof_lower.description: Lower bound of the oe_lof 90% confidence interval.

oe_lof_upper.description: Upper bound of the oe_lof 90% confidence interval (= LOEUF).

loeuf.description: Loss-of-function observed/expected upper bound fraction (= oe_lof_upper); lower = more constrained.

syn_z.description: Synonymous constraint Z-score (calibration metric; should be near 0).
